languages.text: "Триединая сущность, амальгама лучших составных частей трех индивидуумов, проявивших себя в служении. Метафизически она состоит из трех начал — бренной плоти, феррум санктум и праведности. Сотворив идеальную комбинацию, мы получим общность, многократно первосходящую ее составляющие по своим качествам и пользе для {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Триединая сущность, амальгама лучших составных частей трех индивидуумов, проявивших себя в служении. Метафизически она состоит из трех начал — бренной плоти, феррум санктум и праведности. Сотворив идеальную комбинацию, мы получим общность, многократно первосходящую ее составляющие по своим качествам и пользе для {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

languages.text: "The triune essence, the amalgam of the best constituent parts of three individuals who have excelled themselves in service. Metaphysically, it consists of three beginnings — mortal flesh, Ferrum Sanctum, and righteousness. By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Триединая сущность, амальгама лучших составных частей трех индивидуумов, проявивших себя в служении. Метафизически она состоит из трех начал — бренной плоти, феррум санктум и праведности. Сотворив идеальную комбинацию, мы получим общность, многократно первосходящую ее составляющие по своим качествам и пользе для {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the Imperium."

languages.text: 「三つの精髄、三人の優れた構成要素の融合。精神的には、三つの始まりから成り立つ。肉体、聖なる鉄、正義。この完璧な組み合わせによって、我々は、その構成要素よりもはるかに優れた質と帝国への貢献度を持つ全体を達成する」
languages.original_text: "The triune essence, the amalgam of the best constituent parts of three individuals who have excelled themselves in service. Metaphysically, it consists of three beginnings — mortal flesh, ferrum sanctum, and righteousness. By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the Imperium."

traits.locale_text: 「三つの精髄、三人の優れた構成要素の融合。精神的には、三つの始まりから成り立つ。肉体、聖なる鉄、正義。この完璧な組み合わせによって、我々は、その構成要素よりもはるかに優れた質と帝国への貢献度を持つ全体を達成する。」

languages.text: “三位一体的本质，是将三名在服役中表现卓越的个体，取其最优秀的构成部分，再融合为一。在形而上学的层面，它由三大本原构成：凡人血肉、钢铁圣所与正义。只要创造出完美的结合，我们就能得到一个全新的整体。这个整体的品质，及其对{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}的实用价值，将远远超出其组成部分。”
languages.original_text: "The triune essence, the amalgam of the best constituent parts of three individuals who have excelled themselves in service. Metaphysically, it consists of three beginnings — mortal flesh, Ferrum Sanctum, and righteousness. By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “三位一体的本质，是将三名在服役中表现卓越的个体，取其最优秀的构成部分，再融合为一。在形而上学的层面，它由三大本原构成：凡人血肉、钢铁圣所与正义。只要创造出完美的结合，我们就能得到一个全新的整体。这个整体的品质，及其对{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}的实用价值，将远远超出其组成部分。”

languages.text: «La esencia trina, la amalgama de las mejores partes constituyentes de tres individuos excelentes en su servicio. A nivel metafísico, consta de tres puntos de partida: carne mortal, Ferrum Sanctum y virtud. Al crear la combinación perfecta, obtendremos un total inmensamente superior a sus componentes en sus cualidades y utilidad al {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}».
languages.original_text: "The triune essence, the amalgam of the best constituent parts of three individuals who have excelled themselves in service. Metaphysically, it consists of three beginnings — mortal flesh, Ferrum Sanctum, and righteousness. By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «La esencia trina, la amalgama de las mejores partes constituyentes de tres individuos excelentes en su servicio. A nivel metafísico, consta de tres puntos de partida: carne mortal, Ferrum Sanctum y virtud. Al crear la combinación perfecta, obtendremos un total inmensamente superior a sus componentes en sus cualidades y utilidad al {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}».

languages.text: "Die dreifaltige Essenz, die Verbindung der besten Bestandteile dreier Individuen, die im Dienst über sich hinauswuchsen. Metaphysisch betrachtet, haben wir es mit drei Anfängen zu tun ... sterblichem Fleisch, Ferrum sanctum und Rechtschaffenheit. Durch die Schaffung der perfekten Kombination erreichen wir eine Gesamtheit, die den einzelnen Komponenten hinsichtlich ihrer Qualität und Nützlichkeit für das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} weit überlegen ist."
languages.original_text: "The triune essence, the amalgam of the best constituent parts of three individuals who have excelled themselves in service. Metaphysically, it consists of three beginnings — mortal flesh, Ferrum Sanctum, and righteousness. By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Die dreifaltige Essenz, die Verbindung der besten Bestandteile dreier Individuen, die im Dienst über sich hinauswuchsen. Metaphysisch betrachtet, haben wir es mit drei Anfängen zu tun ... sterblichem Fleisch, Ferrum sanctum und Rechtschaffenheit. Durch die Schaffung der perfekten Kombination erreichen wir eine Gesamtheit, die den einzelnen Komponenten hinsichtlich ihrer Qualität und Nützlichkeit für das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} weit überlegen ist."

languages.text: « L'essence trinitaire, l'amalgame des meilleurs constituants de ces individus qui ont tous les trois accompli leur service de manière exemplaire. Métaphysiquement parlant, cela consiste en trois commencements : la chair mortelle, le Ferrum Sanctum et la vertu. En formant la combinaison parfaite, nous obtiendrons un être qui sera largement supérieur aux éléments qui le composent, aussi bien sur le plan de ses qualités que de son utilité pour l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "The triune essence, the amalgam of the best constituent parts of three individuals who have excelled themselves in service. Metaphysically, it consists of three beginnings — mortal flesh, Ferrum Sanctum, and righteousness. By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « L'essence trinitaire, l'amalgame des meilleurs constituants de ces individus qui ont tous les trois accompli leur service de manière exemplaire. languages.text: "Üçlü öz, hizmette kendilerini aşmış üç bireyin en iyi öz parçalarının birleşimi. Metafiziksel olarak üç başlangıçtan oluşur: Ölümlü et, demir kutak ve doğruluk. Mükemmel kombinasyonu yaratarak nitelikleri ve {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'a{/g} olan faydası açısından bileşenlerinden çok daha üstün bir bütünlük elde edeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "The triune essence, the amalgam of the best constituent parts of three individuals who have excelled themselves in service. Metaphysically, it consists of three beginnings — mortal flesh, Ferrum Sanctum, and righteousness. By creating the perfect combination, we will achieve a totality that is vastly superior to its components in its qualities and usefulness to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."
